summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Mestar agricultural equipment website UI updates iteration 2. All requested features tested successfully including new logo, product card hover effects, Arabic language support, stats values, and navigation.
passed_tests: New logo displays correctly in navbar (Gemini generated image)
New logo displays correctly in footer (Gemini generated image)
Product cards show 4 equal-size columns side by side
Hover effects work on all 4 product cards - machine images appear with opacity changes
Stats section shows correct values: 12+ products, 50+ experience, 10+ countries, 15+ employees
Language toggle cycles correctly through 3 languages: TR -> EN -> AR -> TR
Arabic language support: navbar text displays in Arabic after 2 clicks
Arabic RTL layout applied correctly (dir=rtl on html element)
Hero slider title text is readable with appropriate size classes
